diario"><meta property="twitter:image" content="https://lapalabradeldia.com/images/logo_og_1200x630.png"><!-- App --><meta name="application-name" content="La palabra del día"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="La Palabra"><meta name="description" content="Un juego de palabras diario"><meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no"><meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"><meta name="msapplication-config" content="/icons/browserconfig.xml"><meta name="msapplication-TileColor" content="#2B5797"><meta name="msapplication-tap-highlight" content="no"><meta name="theme-color" content="#000000"><link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.webmanifest"><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png"><script>
  // On page load or when changing themes, best to add inline in `head` to avoid FOUC

  let theme = "system"
  if (localStorage.settings) {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(localStorage.settings)
    if (parsed.state && parsed.state.theme) {
      theme = parsed.state.theme
    }
  }

  const darkThemeMQ = window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)")
  if (theme === "dark" || (theme == "system" && darkThemeMQ.matches)) {
    document.documentElement.classList.add("dark")
  } else {
    document.documentElement.classList.remove("dark")
  }
</script><script>
  var observer = new MutationObserver(function (mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function (mutation) {
      var nodes = Array.prototype.slice.call(mutation.addedNodes)
      nodes.forEach(function (node) {
        if (node.className == "google-revocation-link-placeholder") {
          node.remove()
        }
        if (node.shadowRoot) {
          node.remove()
        }
      })
    })
  })

  observer.observe(document.documentElement, {
    childList: true,
    subtree: true,
    attributes: false,
    characterData: false,
  })
</script><script defer crossorigin="anonymous" src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-6864455072894667" data-overlays="top"></script><script defer crossorigin="anonymous" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-B1PJ1F7YBM"></script><script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || []
  function gtag() {
    dataLayer.push(arguments)
  }
  gtag("js", new Date())

  gtag("config", "G-B1PJ1F7YBM") // Analytics
</script><script>
  window.googletag = window.googletag || { cmd: [] }
  googletag.cmd.push(function () {
    googletag
      .defineSlot(
        "/147246189,22724240645/lapalabradeldia_1000x100_desktop",
        [
          [970, 90],
          [970, 50],
          [728, 90],
          [950, 90],
          [1000, 100],
          [1000, 90],
        ],
        "lapalabradeldia_1000x100_desktop"
      )
      .addService(googletag.pubads())
    if (window.innerHeight > 615) {
      googletag
        .defineSlot(
          "/147246189,22724240645/lapalabradeldia_320x100_mobile",
          [
            [320, 100],
            [320, 50],
            [300, 100],
            [300, 50],
          ],
          "lapalabradeldia_billboard_mobile"
        )
        .addService(googletag.pubads())
    } else {
      googletag
        .defineSlot(
          "/147246189,22724240645/lapalabradeldia_320x50_mobile",
          [
            [320, 50],
            [300, 50],
          ],
          "lapalabradeldia_billboard_mobile"
        )
        .addService(googletag.pubads())
    }
    var interstitialSlot = googletag.defineOutOfPageSlot(
      "/147246189,22724240645/lapalabradeldia.com_interstitial",
      googletag.enums.OutOfPageFormat.INTERSTITIAL
    )
    if (interstitialSlot) interstitialSlot.addService(googletag.pubads())
    googletag.pubads().enableSingleRequest()
    googletag.pubads().disableInitialLoad()
    googletag.enableServices()
    // Do not display automatically, do it programmatically on ad-banner.tsx
    // googletag.display(interstitialSlot)
  })
</script><link rel="stylesheet" href="/_astro/index.DKpW7iXq.css"></head> <body class="bg-white font-sans antialiased dark:bg-zinc-950"> <noscript> <div class="js-disabled-banner mx-auto my-8 flex max-w-xl flex-col items-center justify-center border-2 border-red-500 bg-red-500/10 p-8"> <p class="text-center">
La palabra del día requiere JavaScript para funcionar correctamente.
</p> <p class="text-center">
Por favor, habilita JavaScript en tu navegador y recarga la página.
</p> </div> <style>
        .js-disabled-banner {
          display: block;
        }

f of u.split("."))this.Component=this.Component[f]}return this.hydrator=p,this.hydrate},e,this)}catch(n){console.error(`[astro-island] Error hydrating id="first-loader" class="flex h-screen w-screen items-center justify-center"> <div id="animation" class="relative h-[94px] w-[94px]"> <div class="loader-square"></div> <div class="loader-square"></div> <div class="loader-square"></div> <div class="loader-square"></div> <div class="loader-square"></div> <div class="loader-square"></div> <div class="loader-square"></div> </div> <div id="refresh-msg" class="mx-2 hidden text-center"> <div class="mx-auto flex w-full max-w-[400px] flex-col items-center justify-center"> <div class="mx-auto mb-4 flex h-8 w-8 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-100"> <svg class="h-6 w-6 text-red-600" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"> <path 15.75h.007v.008H12v-.008z"></path> </svg> </div> <p class="my-2 text-xl">El juego esta tardando demasiado en cargar</p> <p class="text-md m-0 text-gray-500">
Si estas en una conección lenta espera un poco más y el juego debería
        cargar pronto
</p> <p class="text-md my-2 text-gray-500">
También es posible que haya una nueva versión disponible, puedes
        intentar recargar la página
</p> <a href="javascript:window.location.reload(true);" class="my-4 w-[200px] rounded-lg bg-[#43a047] px-4 py-2 text-center font-bold text-white no-underline">
Recargar la pagina
</a> <a class="m-0 mt-2 text-sm text-gray-500 underline" href="https://status.lapalabradeldia.com" target="_blank">
Si el problema persiste puedes ver el estado del servicio aquí
</a> </div> </div> </div> <script type="module">setInterval(()=>{const n=document.getElementById("first-loader"),e=document.getElementById("refresh-msg"),t=document.getElementById("animation");n&&e&&(e.style.display="block"),t&&t.remove()},5e3);
//# sourceMappingURL=SquaresLoader.astro_astro_type_script_index_0_lang.BVyty0-3.js.map</script></template><!--astro:end--></astro-island>  <astro-island uid="qiajy" prefix="r3" component-url="/_astro/toaster.Ciev-qyG.js" component-export="Toaster" renderer-url="/_astro/client.BhCquMC8.js" props="{}" ssr client="load" opts="{&quot;name&quot;:&quot;Toaster&quot;,&quot;value&quot;:true}" await-children><div role="region" aria-label="Notifications (F8)" tabindex="-1" style="pointer-events:none"><ol tabindex="-1" class="fixed top-0 z-[100] flex max-h-screen w-full flex-col-reverse gap-2 p-4 sm:left-1/2 sm:-translate-x-1/2 md:max-w-[420px]"></ol></div><!--astro:end--></astro-island> <astro-island uid="ZQpF7y" prefix="r4" component-url="/_astro/ColorBlind.C-lxtE5g.js" component-export="ColorBlind" renderer-url="/_astro/client.BhCquMC8.js" props="{}" ssr client="load" opts="{&quot;name&quot;:&quot;ColorBlind&quot;,&quot;value&quot;:true}"></astro-island> <script src="//instant.page/5.2.0" type="module" integrity="sha384-jnZyxPjiipYXnSU0ygqeac2q7CVYMbh84q0uHVRRxEtvFPiQYbXWUorga2aqZJ0z"></script> </body> </html>
